TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavCon-marriage_abas_pilaw
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: pawRat tinaku tamaku kila unaypa ngidanta.
S.PHON: pawʁat tinaku tamaku kira unajpa ŋiɮanta.
S.FORM: pawRat tinaku tamaku kila unaypa ngidanta.
S.PHON: pawʁat tinaku tamaku kira unajpa ŋiɮanta.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽爸爸決定我的先生是他.
My mother and father decided that I should marry him.
「Kingciang不能入贅,你喜歡他做什麼?」他們這樣說.
'Kingciang couldn't marry into our family. Why do you like him?' they said.

W.TRANSL: 未來-PA-做什麼-名物化-2SG.屬格

S.FORM: quniakita anemta haw pawRattiiku qaya nani.
S.PHON: quniakita anəmta haw pawʁattiiku qaja nani.
S.FORM: quniakita anemta haw pawRattiiku qaya nani.
S.PHON: quniakita anəmta haw pawʁattiiku qaja nani.
S.TRANSL: 我沒有辦法,我就是喜歡他.
What should I do? I just like him.
I married Batu and had two children.

S.FORM: en qapataypaiku si kawkaiku mlikay tibatuan zin na anemku nani.
S.PHON: ən qapatajpaiku si kawkaiku mrikaj tiβatuan z~rin na anəmku nani.
S.FORM: en qapataypaiku si kawkaiku mlikay tibatuan zin na anemku nani.
S.PHON: ən qapatajpaiku si kawkaiku mrikaj tiβatuan z~rin na anəmku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我想,只有我死了,我才能離開Batu.
Only when I die can I leave Batu, I think.

S.FORM: quniakita mai tu ququnian anem yau aipa.
S.PHON: quniakita mai tu ququnian anəm jau aipa.
S.FORM: quniakita mai tu ququnian anem yau aipa.
S.PHON: quniakita mai tu ququnian anəm jau aipa.
S.TRANSL: 沒有辦法在一起,還是要離開.

TRANSL.notes: What could we do? (There is nothing we could do.)

S.TRANSL: I told them the story, and they kept laughing.
Your brother hadn't passed away then.
Your brother hadn't passed away then.

S.FORM: tiana kaputna tialan yauti mawtu qman satutu yauti nani.
S.PHON: tiana kaputna tiaran jauti mawtu qman satutu jauti nani.
S.FORM: tiana kaputna tialan yauti mawtu qman satutu yauti nani.
S.PHON: tiana kaputna tiaran jauti mawtu qman satutu jauti nani.

S.TRANSL: I fell asleep during the worship.

S.FORM: yauti ya ti kingciang nani mana muRingisu zinnaiku.
S.PHON: jauti ja ti kiŋʦiaŋ nani mana muʁiŋisu z~rinnaiku.
S.FORM: yauti ya ti kingciang nani mana muRingisu zinnaiku.
S.PHON: jauti ja ti kiŋʦiaŋ nani mana muʁiŋisu z~rinnaiku.
S.TRANSL: 有Kingciang,他問我「你為什麼哭呢?」

TRANSL.notes: There was Kingciang (in my dream). 'Why are you crying?' he said.

S.TRANSL: There was Kingciang . 'Why are you crying?' he said.

S.FORM: nazauiku maynep kya qaqapanna ya zauku nani.
S.PHON: naz~rauiku majnəp kja qaqapanna ja z~rauku nani.
S.FORM: nazauiku maynep kya qaqapanna ya zauku nani.
S.PHON: naz~rauiku majnəp kja qaqapanna ja z~rauku nani.

TRANSL.notes: 我睡覺(的時候),他摸我的....

S.TRANSL: When I was sleeping, he touched my... .

S.FORM: ya maiiku muRing zinsu mana mzizi ya limasu ka.
S.PHON: ja maiiku muʁiŋ z~rinsu mana mz~riz~ri ja rimasu ka.
S.FORM: ya maiiku muRing zinsu mana mzizi ya limasu ka.
S.PHON: ja maiiku muʁiŋ z~rinsu mana mz~riz~ri ja rimasu ka.
S.TRANSL: 你說沒有哭,為什麼你的手溼溼的?

TRANSL.notes: You said you didn't cry, (but) why are your hands wet?

S.TRANSL: You said you didn't cry, why are your hands wet?

S.FORM: watasinuzaisang sikusiwaketei ageilukala zinnaiku ni kingciang.
S.PHON: watasinuz~raisaŋ sikusiwakətəi agəirukara z~rinnaiku ni kiŋʦiaŋ.
S.FORM: watasinuzaisang sikusiwaketei ageilukala zinnaiku ni kingciang.
S.PHON: watasinuz~raisaŋ sikusiwakətəi agəirukara z~rinnaiku ni kiŋʦiaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 'I'll give you half of my property,' said Kingciang.
我說,「我不要你的財產,只要你愛我就夠了.」
'I don't want your properties. your love alone is enough,' I said.

S.FORM: tangitiiku ma mRaputuyiku tamaizipana patayti tibatu unay nani.
S.PHON: taŋitiiku ma mʁaputujiku tamaiz~ripana patajti tiβatu unaj nani.
S.FORM: tangitiiku ma mRaputuyiku tamaizipana patayti tibatu unay nani.
S.PHON: taŋitiiku ma mʁaputujiku tamaiz~ripana patajti tiβatu unaj nani.

TRANSL.notes: I dreamed of him (Kingciang) after Batu passed away.

S.TRANSL: I dreamed of him after Batu passed away.

S.FORM: sanuaka si qanuni niRaputuyku mana nayau.
S.PHON: sanuaka si qanuni niʁaputujku mana najau.
S.FORM: sanuaka si qanuni niRaputuyku mana nayau.
S.PHON: sanuaka si qanuni niʁaputujku mana najau.
S.TRANSL: 我想問Kingciang我怎麼會作這樣的夢.
I wanted to ask Kingciang how come I dreamed such a dream.

S.FORM: XXXX matapunimi yau tiuqis matapunimi tikingciang.
XXXX matapunimi yau tiuqis matapunimi tikingciang.
pamengti tmuzus tu qawianna saising ya.
S.PHON: paməŋti tmuz~rus tu qawianna saisiŋ ja.
S.FORM: pamengti tmuzus tu qawianna saising ya.
S.PHON: paməŋti tmuz~rus tu qawianna saisiŋ ja.

TRANSL.notes: (結果沒想到,沒有講,)Kingciang就去住院了.
(I didn't tell him.) He went to the hospital.

S.FORM: nayau mai bunay anemku tuzus tu qapatayan.
S.PHON: najau mai βunaj anəmku tuz~rus tu qapatajan.
S.FORM: nayau mai bunay anemku tuzus tu qapatayan.
S.PHON: najau mai βunaj anəmku tuz~rus tu qapatajan.

S.FORM: tayan pakunkuankuti tayan nani mtawtawati qaniyau smanuti qaya yu tinaku yu wazuq tibaRuq.
S.PHON: tajan pakunkuankuti tajan nani mtawtawati qanijau smanuti qaja ju tinaku ju waz~ruq tiβaʁuq.
S.FORM: tayan pakunkuankuti tayan nani mtawtawati qaniyau smanuti qaya yu tinaku yu wazuq tibaRuq.
S.PHON: tajan pakunkuankuti tajan nani mtawtawati qanijau smanuti qaja ju tinaku ju waz~ruq tiβaʁuq.

TRANSL.notes: [翻譯漏失] 我媽媽講BaRuq就是這樣(不答應).

S.TRANSL: [翻譯漏失] 我媽媽講BaRuq就是這樣 .
[translation missing] 'BaRuq is like this,' said my mom.

S.FORM: zinna mai izau pawRat qaya ngid ala zinna na abuku.
S.PHON: z~rinna mai iz~rau pawʁat qaja ŋiɮ ara z~rinna na aβuku.
S.FORM: zinna mai izau pawRat qaya ngid ala zinna na abuku.
S.PHON: z~rinna mai iz~rau pawʁat qaja ŋiɮ ara z~rinna na aβuku.
S.TRANSL: 'I want Kingciang to marry into our family,' said my mom.
He cannot marry into your family.

TRANSL.notes: 他們互相要(Abas的媽媽要Kingciang入贅,Kingciang的媽媽要Abas嫁過來).
They pulled each other. (They wanted each other's child to marry into their family.)

S.FORM: masang mai smulud XXXX maipama sinapawan mai smulud tibaRuq zinna maipama sinapawan nani.
S.PHON: masaŋ mai smuruɮ **** maipama sinapawan mai smuruɮ tiβaʁuq z~rinna maipama sinapawan nani.
S.FORM: masang mai smulud XXXX maipama sinapawan mai smulud tibaRuq zinna maipama sinapawan nani.
S.PHON: masaŋ mai smuruɮ **** maipama sinapawan mai smuruɮ tiβaʁuq z~rinna maipama sinapawan nani.
S.TRANSL: Not married yet at the time.
我們去警察局,你們的家就在那邊.
We went to the police station near your home.
怎麼辦呢?你的女兒給我.
What can we do? Give me your daughter.

S.FORM: zinaniku XXXX abaku XXXX ni abata tikuli nani.
S.PHON: z~rinaniku **** aβaku **** ni aβata tikuri nani.
S.FORM: zinaniku XXXX abaku XXXX ni abata tikuli nani.
S.PHON: z~rinaniku **** aβaku **** ni aβata tikuri nani.

S.FORM: bulaiku tu sunissu mluluniku quniaka smulud tu sunissu zinna XXXX na abaku nani.
S.PHON: βuraiku tu sunissu mruruniku quniaka smuruɮ tu sunissu z~rinna **** na aβaku nani.
S.FORM: bulaiku tu sunissu mluluniku quniaka smulud tu sunissu zinna XXXX na abaku nani.
S.PHON: βuraiku tu sunissu mruruniku quniaka smuruɮ tu sunissu z~rinna **** na aβaku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我爸爸講,我有傷口,你兒子給我.
My dad said, I'm hurt. Give me your son.

S.FORM: tama ti paqnanem sunisku tu Runanay si.
S.PHON: tama ti paqnanəm sunisku tu ʁunanaj si.
S.FORM: tama ti paqnanem sunisku tu Runanay si.
S.PHON: tama ti paqnanəm sunisku tu ʁunanaj si.

S.FORM: mRasaimi tu zena tianati kuay zinna.
S.PHON: mʁasaimi tu z~rəna tianati kuaj z~rinna.
S.FORM: mRasaimi tu zena tianati kuay zinna.
S.PHON: mʁasaimi tu z~rəna tianati kuaj z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 我們有買水田,誰要工作?他說.
We bought the paddy field. Who will till the land? He said.

S.FORM: XXXX siqatuluimi matiw tuqaan na tamaku matiw.
S.PHON: **** siqaturuimi matiw tuqaan na tamaku matiw.
S.FORM: XXXX siqatuluimi matiw tuqaan na tamaku matiw.
S.PHON: **** siqaturuimi matiw tuqaan na tamaku matiw.
S.TRANSL: 我們去了三次.我爸爸要當面講.
We went there three times. My father wanted to talk face to face.

S.FORM: en a XXXX qaya a nayau saqatuluimi matiw taqimuyan nani.
S.PHON: ən a **** qaja a najau saqaturuimi matiw taqimujan nani.
S.FORM: en a XXXX qaya a nayau saqatuluimi matiw taqimuyan nani.
S.PHON: ən a **** qaja a najau saqaturuimi matiw taqimujan nani.
S.TRANSL: We went to the police station three times.

S.FORM: ngid ala tikingciangan nani taqa sulud tamaku kyami taqa sulud ya tamaku kyami nayau simtebes zinna nani.
S.PHON: ŋiɮ ara tikiŋʦiaŋan nani taqa suruɮ tamaku kjami taqa suruɮ ja tamaku kjami najau simtəβəs z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: ngid ala tikingciangan nani taqa sulud tamaku kyami taqa sulud ya tamaku kyami nayau simtebes zinna nani.
S.PHON: ŋiɮ ara tikiŋʦiaŋan nani taqa suruɮ tamaku kjami taqa suruɮ ja tamaku kjami najau simtəβəs z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 想要Kingciang入贅,我爸爸不答應,互相拉扯,他說.

TRANSL.notes: We wanted Kingciang to marry into our family, (but) my father didn't agree so they pulled each other, he said.

S.TRANSL: We wanted Kingciang to marry into our family, my father didn't agree so they pulled each other, he said.

S.FORM: oh nayau ya yau kikungiku haw tu batu nani.
S.PHON: *h najau ja jau kikuŋiku haw tu βatu nani.
S.FORM: oh nayau ya yau kikungiku haw tu batu nani.
S.PHON: *h najau ja jau kikuŋiku haw tu βatu nani.

S.FORM: mai tu niana aimi kikung ne.
S.PHON: mai tu niana aimi kikuŋ nə.
S.FORM: mai tu niana aimi kikung ne.
S.PHON: mai tu niana aimi kikuŋ nə.
S.TRANSL: 我們結婚時沒有什麼東西.
We had nothing when we married.

S.FORM: o pamengimi ma matiw qaya sa iza u sa lalu'ung mala tibatuan nani.
S.PHON: * paməŋimi ma matiw qaja sa iz~ra u sa raruʔuŋ mara tiβatuan nani.
S.FORM: o pamengimi ma matiw qaya sa iza u sa lalu'ung mala tibatuan nani.
S.PHON: * paməŋimi ma matiw qaja sa iz~ra u sa raruʔuŋ mara tiβatuan nani.
S.TRANSL: We finally went to Lalu'ung to pick up Batu.

S.FORM: Raysezangita saizi yau mai tu kawswa.
S.PHON: ʁajsəz~raŋita saiz~ri jau mai tu kawswa.
S.FORM: Raysezangita saizi yau mai tu kawswa.
S.PHON: ʁajsəz~raŋita saiz~ri jau mai tu kawswa.
S.TRANSL: We didn't have umbrellas. We were exposed to the sun.

S.FORM: XXXX XXXX XXXX tanuzannaimi qaya tmanan.
XXXX XXXX XXXX tanuzannaimi qaya tmanan.
S.TRANSL: He followed us when returning home.

S.FORM: tu mkikungti yauiku ta yauimi ta inpanan yu.
S.PHON: tu mkikuŋti jauiku ta jauimi ta inpanan ju.
S.FORM: tu mkikungti yauiku ta yauimi ta inpanan yu.
S.PHON: tu mkikuŋti jauiku ta jauimi ta inpanan ju.
S.TRANSL: 婚禮以後,我們待在房間.
After the wedding, we were in the room.

S.FORM: kin tibatu kinawsa tu Rabi unay nani tatemunawan.
S.PHON: kin tiβatu kinawsa tu ʁaβi unaj nani tatəmunawan.
S.FORM: kin tibatu kinawsa tu Rabi unay nani tatemunawan.
S.PHON: kin tiβatu kinawsa tu ʁaβi unaj nani tatəmunawan.
S.TRANSL: 我們倆那天晚上在客廳.
We two were at the living room that night.

S.FORM: wa nayau saiza kikung na masang zinku ya.
S.PHON: wa najau saiz~ra kikuŋ na masaŋ z~rinku ja.
S.FORM: wa nayau saiza kikung na masang zinku ya.
S.PHON: wa najau saiz~ra kikuŋ na masaŋ z~rinku ja.

S.FORM: nayau nikikunganay utani smani taqanan qaya.
S.PHON: najau nikikuŋanaj utani smani taqanan qaja.
S.FORM: nayau nikikunganay utani smani taqanan qaya.
S.PHON: najau nikikuŋanaj utani smani taqanan qaja.
S.TRANSL: I didn't know how many people were invited.

W.TRANSL: 完成-結婚-名物化=關係詞

S.FORM: kikung zintati saizi nayau nayau saizi mai izau maitiimi mzukat ta ta tataqanan yau.
S.PHON: kikuŋ z~rintati saiz~ri najau najau saiz~ri mai iz~rau maitiimi mz~rukat ta ta tataqanan jau.
S.FORM: kikung zintati saizi nayau nayau saizi mai izau maitiimi mzukat ta ta tataqanan yau.
S.PHON: kikuŋ z~rintati saiz~ri najau najau saiz~ri mai iz~rau maitiimi mz~rukat ta ta tataqanan jau.
S.TRANSL: 結婚就是這樣.就是那樣.沒有出來一起吃飯.
Marriage was like that. It's like that. We didn't have dinner with the guests.
We two stayed in the room.

S.FORM: nazauimi maded kinawsa yau qman ya baqian XXXX silazat silazat zinta saizi nayau maiimi paqadedanna tataqanan.
S.PHON: naz~rauimi maɮəɮ kinawsa jau qman ja βaqian **** siraz~rat siraz~rat z~rinta saiz~ri najau maiimi paqaɮəɮanna tataqanan.
S.FORM: nazauimi maded kinawsa yau qman ya baqian XXXX silazat silazat zinta saizi nayau maiimi paqadedanna tataqanan.
S.PHON: naz~rauimi maɮəɮ kinawsa jau qman ja βaqian **** siraz~rat siraz~rat z~rinta saiz~ri najau maiimi paqaɮəɮanna tataqanan.
S.TRANSL: 我們倆沒有跟客人在桌子吃飯.
We didn't have dinner with the guests at the table.

S.FORM: zanumiay madedimu taqadanan haw maded mai tu saqanan.
S.PHON: z~ranumiaj maɮəɮimu taqaɮanan haw maɮəɮ mai tu saqanan.
S.FORM: zanumiay madedimu taqadanan haw maded mai tu saqanan.
S.PHON: z~ranumiaj maɮəɮimu taqaɮanan haw maɮəɮ mai tu saqanan.

TRANSL.notes: 你有坐到椅子(吃飯)?沒有吃的嗎?

S.TRANSL: 你有坐到椅子 ?沒有吃的嗎?
Did you sit on the chair? Nothing to eat?
We didn't eat with the guests.
We two stayed in the room.
Who wanted to speak to him?
I didn't like him. We didn't talk to each other.

S.FORM: nayau a simqipesita haw mai sikawkawma.
S.PHON: najau a simqipəsita haw mai sikawkawma.
S.FORM: nayau a simqipesita haw mai sikawkawma.
S.PHON: najau a simqipəsita haw mai sikawkawma.
S.TRANSL: We didn't like each other. We didn't speak to each other.

S.FORM: nayau ni 'daq kwa mai tu mai simqalizaqan haw.
S.PHON: najau ni ʔɮaq kwa mai tu mai simqariz~raqan haw.
S.FORM: nayau ni 'daq kwa mai tu mai simqalizaqan haw.
S.PHON: najau ni ʔɮaq kwa mai tu mai simqariz~raqan haw.
S.TRANSL: 別人會這樣嗎?彼此不喜歡.
Would others be like this? You didn't like each other.

S.FORM: m mai tu anu simqalizaq aita qayauita sikawkawma ya.
S.PHON: m mai tu anu simqariz~raq aita qajauita sikawkawma ja.
S.FORM: m mai tu anu simqalizaq aita qayauita sikawkawma ya.
S.PHON: m mai tu anu simqariz~raq aita qajauita sikawkawma ja.
S.TRANSL: 對.如果彼此喜歡,就會聊天.
Yes. If we like each other, we will chat.

S.FORM: en ya niana zaniq zaku nani msyukay na tama tinalis.
S.PHON: ən ja niana z~raniq z~raku nani msjukaj na tama tinaris.
S.FORM: en ya niana zaniq zaku nani msyukay na tama tinalis.
S.PHON: ən ja niana z~raniq z~raku nani msjukaj na tama tinaris.

S.FORM: haw en nani tama tinalis nani pameng mawtu kya kwa mana mawtu a baqian sebalas zinku.
S.PHON: haw ən nani tama tinaris nani paməŋ mawtu kja kwa mana mawtu a βaqian səβaras z~rinku.
S.FORM: haw en nani tama tinalis nani pameng mawtu kya kwa mana mawtu a baqian sebalas zinku.
S.PHON: haw ən nani tama tinaris nani paməŋ mawtu kja kwa mana mawtu a βaqian səβaras z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: 老人家Nalis突然來.他為什麼來?
The elder, Nalis, came suddenly. Why did he come?

S.FORM: qu nazau yu tiaRay zinnati ya qu aiku nani.
S.PHON: qu naz~rau ju tiaʁaj z~rinnati ja qu aiku nani.
S.FORM: qu nazau yu tiaRay zinnati ya qu aiku nani.
S.PHON: qu naz~rau ju tiaʁaj z~rinnati ja qu aiku nani.

S.TRANSL: I didn't want to get married then.
你那時幾歲?已經十六,快十七歲.

S.FORM: ziwkiwsay ka ziwnanasay kikungtiimi haw nani.
S.PHON: z~riwkiwsaj ka z~riwnanasaj kikuŋtiimi haw nani.
S.FORM: ziwkiwsay ka ziwnanasay kikungtiimi haw nani.
S.PHON: z~riwkiwsaj ka z~riwnanasaj kikuŋtiimi haw nani.
S.TRANSL: 十九歲.我們結婚的時候,我十七歲.
Nineteen years old. I was seventeen years old when we married.

S.FORM: nani tmuRin smulud apaku a nayau si nengiti a kiwku haw.
S.PHON: nani tmuʁin smuruɮ apaku a najau si nəŋiti a kiwku haw.
S.FORM: nani tmuRin smulud apaku a nayau si nengiti a kiwku haw.
S.PHON: nani tmuʁin smuruɮ apaku a najau si nəŋiti a kiwku haw.
S.TRANSL: 我爸爸就馬上答應.Kiwku也好.
My father agreed immediately. Kiwku was okay.

S.FORM: maiti tu apa mai tu abu haw.
S.PHON: maiti tu apa mai tu aβu haw.
S.FORM: maiti tu apa mai tu abu haw.
S.PHON: maiti tu apa mai tu aβu haw.

S.FORM: wantima amana ti pilaw pilaw nengiti taniti qenabinusna m zinna nani.
S.PHON: wantima amana ti piraw piraw nəŋiti taniti qənaβinusna m z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: wantima amana ti pilaw pilaw nengiti taniti qenabinusna m zinna nani.
S.PHON: wantima amana ti piraw piraw nəŋiti taniti qənaβinusna m z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: Only Grandmom Pilaw. For how many years could she still live?

S.FORM: na'ayiku mangay papukun na'ayiku tiaRay mai zinku qaya.
S.PHON: naʔajiku maŋaj papukun naʔajiku tiaʁaj mai z~rinku qaja.
S.FORM: na'ayiku mangay papukun na'ayiku tiaRay mai zinku qaya.
S.PHON: naʔajiku maŋaj papukun naʔajiku tiaʁaj mai z~rinku qaja.
S.TRANSL: 我沒有講說我不要ARay,我怕被打.

TRANSL.notes: I didn't say ARay I didn't want to, (because) I'm afraid I would be beaten.

S.TRANSL: I didn't say ARay I didn't want to, I'm afraid I would be beaten.

S.FORM: nayau nikasianemanta maipa maipama ngid sinapawan si.
S.PHON: najau nikasianəmanta maipa maipama ŋiɮ sinapawan si.
S.FORM: nayau nikasianemanta maipa maipama ngid sinapawan si.
S.PHON: najau nikasianəmanta maipa maipama ŋiɮ sinapawan si.
S.TRANSL: 我就是這樣想的,還不想結婚.
I thought so. I didn't want to marry yet.

S.FORM: mawtu tinaliz si siqatulu yu mawtu tama tinaliz nani.
S.PHON: mawtu tinariz~r si siqaturu ju mawtu tama tinariz~r nani.
S.FORM: mawtu tinaliz si siqatulu yu mawtu tama tinaliz nani.
S.PHON: mawtu tinariz~r si siqaturu ju mawtu tama tinariz~r nani.
S.TRANSL: The elder, Naliz, came three times.

S.FORM: a nayau si e koniapa kunaantapa koniaku.
S.PHON: a najau si ə k*niapa kunaantapa k*niaku.
S.FORM: a nayau si e koniapa kunaantapa koniaku.
S.PHON: a najau si ə k*niapa kunaantapa k*niaku.

S.FORM: zinna ya kikung zinna kwa kuna kikung zinna koniaku zinna kebalan tu nayau kwa u m pamengti ya tu tinhunpa tinhun niana na kyataya o taqaiku kyami.
S.PHON: z~rinna ja kikuŋ z~rinna kwa kuna kikuŋ z~rinna k*niaku z~rinna kəβaran tu najau kwa u m paməŋti ja tu tinhunpa tinhun niana na kjataja * taqaiku kjami.
S.FORM: zinna ya kikung zinna kwa kuna kikung zinna koniaku zinna kebalan tu nayau kwa u m pamengti ya tu tinhunpa tinhun niana na kyataya o taqaiku kyami.
S.PHON: z~rinna ja kikuŋ z~rinna kwa kuna kikuŋ z~rinna k*niaku z~rinna kəβaran tu najau kwa u m paməŋti ja tu tinhunpa tinhun niana na kjataja * taqaiku kjami.

TRANSL.notes: [翻譯漏失] 訂婚也沒有什麼.我不要(結婚).

S.TRANSL: [翻譯漏失] 訂婚也沒有什麼.我不要 .

TRANSL.notes: [translation missing] Engagement means nothing. I don't want (to marry).

S.TRANSL: [translation missing] Engagement means nothing. I don't want .

S.FORM: taqaiku nani XXXX yau a temusul taqatibuRan na lepawniq kyami nani.
S.PHON: taqaiku nani **** jau a təmusur taqatiβuʁan na rəpawniq kjami nani.
S.FORM: taqaiku nani XXXX yau a temusul taqatibuRan na lepawniq kyami nani.
S.PHON: taqaiku nani **** jau a təmusur taqatiβuʁan na rəpawniq kjami nani.
S.TRANSL: There was a tree to the south of my house.

S.FORM: punti ya baqian kyami smulud nani.
S.PHON: punti ja βaqian kjami smuruɮ nani.
S.FORM: punti ya baqian kyami smulud nani.
S.PHON: punti ja βaqian kjami smuruɮ nani.

S.FORM: nayau ya XXXX pamengti kikung ya.
nayau ya XXXX pamengti kikung ya.

S.TRANSL: Marriage was simple in the past.
我爸爸說以前結婚就是這樣.
'Marriage is like this,' said my father.

S.FORM: m e izau iza tu kelisiw qinipaya mala tu qinipaya tiaRay mala tu kelisiw anu.
S.PHON: m ə iz~rau iz~ra tu kərisiw qinipaja mara tu qinipaja tiaʁaj mara tu kərisiw anu.
S.FORM: m e izau iza tu kelisiw qinipaya mala tu qinipaya tiaRay mala tu kelisiw anu.
S.PHON: m ə iz~rau iz~ra tu kərisiw qinipaja mara tu qinipaja tiaʁaj mara tu kərisiw anu.

S.FORM: anu makenanta tu izau silazat tu snazau.
S.PHON: anu makənanta tu iz~rau siraz~rat tu snaz~rau.
S.FORM: anu makenanta tu izau silazat tu snazau.
S.PHON: anu makənanta tu iz~rau siraz~rat tu snaz~rau.
S.TRANSL: 真的要結婚時,要在哪裡借錢?
If we were to marry, where could we borrow money?

S.FORM: minku sikiyanta naquni a minko siki.
S.PHON: minku sikijanta naquni a mink* siki.
S.FORM: minku sikiyanta naquni a minko siki.
S.PHON: minku sikijanta naquni a mink* siki.
S.TRANSL: Would we have the wedding of ROC?

S.FORM: taytaanku a tamun yau a saizi taquq nianu nani.
S.PHON: tajtaanku a tamun jau a saiz~ri taquq nianu nani.
S.FORM: taytaanku a tamun yau a saizi taquq nianu nani.
S.PHON: tajtaanku a tamun jau a saiz~ri taquq nianu nani.
S.TRANSL: 我去看菜,有雞肉,什麼都有.
I checked the meals; there were chicken and everything.

S.FORM: akaw XXXX snazau saiza kikung zinku a nayau kikungnumi Ra yau zunpunumi.
S.PHON: akaw **** snaz~rau saiz~ra kikuŋ z~rinku a najau kikuŋnumi ʁa jau z~runpunumi.
S.FORM: akaw XXXX snazau saiza kikung zinku a nayau kikungnumi Ra yau zunpunumi.
S.PHON: akaw **** snaz~rau saiz~ra kikuŋ z~rinku a najau kikuŋnumi ʁa jau z~runpunumi.
S.TRANSL: 結婚就是那樣.你們就是這樣結婚的嗎?你們有煮菜的人嗎?
Marriage was like that. You got married in that way? Did you have chefs?
I don't know who did the cooking.
可能是他家的人煮菜,我不確定.
Perhaps his relatives did the cooking. I'm not sure.

S.FORM: mai nayau ya masangay masang yau niana na masang qamai.
S.PHON: mai najau ja masaŋaj masaŋ jau niana na masaŋ qamai.
S.FORM: mai nayau ya masangay masang yau niana na masang qamai.
S.PHON: mai najau ja masaŋaj masaŋ jau niana na masaŋ qamai.
S.TRANSL: Life in the past was simple.
ARay didn't treat his family well.

S.FORM: nayau XXXX en nayau taqaiku qawman taqaanku siyu.
S.PHON: najau **** ən najau taqaiku qawman taqaanku siju.
S.FORM: nayau XXXX en nayau taqaiku qawman taqaanku siyu.
S.PHON: najau **** ən najau taqaiku qawman taqaanku siju.
S.TRANSL: Yes, that's it. I didn't want him.

S.FORM: yauiku malubi taqasupan m a tatemusulan.
S.PHON: jauiku maruβi taqasupan m a tatəmusuran.
S.FORM: yauiku malubi taqasupan m a tatemusulan.
S.PHON: jauiku maruβi taqasupan m a tatəmusuran.
S.TRANSL: I hid myself under the tree.

S.FORM: nayau lanasay masang en ya niquduta tu sunissu.
S.PHON: najau ranasaj masaŋ ən ja niquɮuta tu sunissu.
S.FORM: nayau lanasay masang en ya niquduta tu sunissu.
S.PHON: najau ranasaj masaŋ ən ja niquɮuta tu sunissu.

S.TRANSL: 我去拿要包粽子的那個.
I took the thing for wrapping Zongzi.

S.FORM: ngidiku si mana nayauan tu sapaqsangan nani.
S.PHON: ŋiɮiku si mana najauan tu sapaqsaŋan nani.
S.FORM: ngidiku si mana nayauan tu sapaqsangan nani.
S.PHON: ŋiɮiku si mana najauan tu sapaqsaŋan nani.
S.TRANSL: Why did you wrap that in that way?

S.FORM: wiyatiiku pasazui ta izaan tawian tapaRaRan ta qidisan na kuliR a yau yauiku tayan malubi.
S.PHON: wijatiiku pasaz~rui ta iz~raan tawian tapaʁaʁan ta qiɮisan na kuriʁ a jau jauiku tajan maruβi.
S.FORM: wiyatiiku pasazui ta izaan tawian tapaRaRan ta qidisan na kuliR a yau yauiku tayan malubi.
S.PHON: wijatiiku pasaz~rui ta iz~raan tawian tapaʁaʁan ta qiɮisan na kuriʁ a jau jauiku tajan maruβi.
S.TRANSL: I went to the cliff at KuliR and hid myself there.

S.FORM: XXXX zinku XXXX smisupama sunisku ti kimlan.
XXXX zinku XXXX smisupama sunisku ti kimlan.
S.TRANSL: My child, Kimlan, still needed breast-feeding.

S.PHON: anu patajiku si taʁnina ʔɮaq taz~rian.
anu patajiku si taʁnina ʔɮaq taz~rian.
S.TRANSL: 如果我死了,別人怎麼會知道我在這兒?
If I die, how do others know that I'm here?
我的小孩怎麼辦?一直哭,還在喝母奶.
What about my child? He kept crying and still needed breast-feeding.
I wanted to take the medicine.
I didn't want to marry Tayliciw.

S.FORM: sunisku XXXX mai haw nani patayti titayliciw mai kamwan anemku.
S.PHON: sunisku **** mai haw nani patajti titajriʦiw mai kamwan anəmku.
S.FORM: sunisku XXXX mai haw nani patayti titayliciw mai kamwan anemku.
S.PHON: sunisku **** mai haw nani patajti titajriʦiw mai kamwan anəmku.
S.TRANSL: Tayliciw去世的時候,我也不甘願.

S.FORM: pamengiku Raputuy tu mana pamengisu muRing zinnaiku ni kingciang nani.
S.PHON: paməŋiku ʁaputuj tu mana paməŋisu muʁiŋ z~rinnaiku ni kiŋʦiaŋ nani.
S.FORM: pamengiku Raputuy tu mana pamengisu muRing zinnaiku ni kingciang nani.
S.PHON: paməŋiku ʁaputuj tu mana paməŋisu muʁiŋ z~rinnaiku ni kiŋʦiaŋ nani.
S.TRANSL: 我夢到Kingciang跟我說:「你為什麼哭呢?」
I made a dream. 'Why are you crying?' said Kingciang to me.

S.FORM: maiiku muRing zinku naytiikangyu anu sikusiyuyutai ageluka zinna man lipun nani.
S.PHON: maiiku muʁiŋ z~rinku najtiikaŋju anu sikusijujutai agəruka z~rinna man ripun nani.
S.FORM: maiiku muRing zinku naytiikangyu anu sikusiyuyutai ageluka zinna man lipun nani.
S.PHON: maiiku muʁiŋ z~rinku najtiikaŋju anu sikusijujutai agəruka z~rinna man ripun nani.
S.TRANSL: 「不要哭,給你一些財產好嗎?」他講日語.
'Don't cry, give you a little of my properties, OK?' he said in Japanese.
「什麼都不要,你在我身邊就好.」
'I want nothing. I only want you to be with me.'

S.FORM: Ramenenganku ni niana Rakiya zinkuti nani.
S.PHON: ʁamənəŋanku ni niana ʁakija z~rinkuti nani.
S.FORM: Ramenenganku ni niana Rakiya zinkuti nani.
S.PHON: ʁamənəŋanku ni niana ʁakija z~rinkuti nani.

S.FORM: pasanuaka tikingciang tu niqatapunku zinku timangu.
S.PHON: pasanuaka tikiŋʦiaŋ tu niqatapunku z~rinku timaŋu.
S.FORM: pasanuaka tikingciang tu niqatapunku zinku timangu.
S.PHON: pasanuaka tikiŋʦiaŋ tu niqatapunku z~rinku timaŋu.
S.TRANSL: 我要講給kingciang聽,我們在一起了.

TRANSL.notes: I wanted to tell Kingciang that we were together (in my dream).

S.TRANSL: I wanted to tell Kingciang that we were together .

W.TRANSL: 使役-告訴-非主焦-1SG.屬格.未來

S.FORM: mai tu dawad pasanu yau tiubin.
S.PHON: mai tu ɮawaɮ pasanu jau tiuβin.
S.FORM: mai tu dawad pasanu yau tiubin.
S.PHON: mai tu ɮawaɮ pasanu jau tiuβin.
S.TRANSL: I didn't have time. Ubin was there.

S.FORM: paskwa sikawkawma pamengti ya RaRiwannatiita mpatayay.
S.PHON: paskwa sikawkawma paməŋti ja ʁaʁiwannatiita mpatajaj.
S.FORM: paskwa sikawkawma pamengti ya RaRiwannatiita mpatayay.
S.PHON: paskwa sikawkawma paməŋti ja ʁaʁiwannatiita mpatajaj.
S.TRANSL: 過年時,他就突然走了,過世了.
He passed away during Chinese New Year.

W.TRANSL: 跑走-處焦-3SG.屬格=完成=1IPL.主格

S.FORM: mai kalingunanna tu pakunkuankuti ya kaputku.
S.PHON: mai kariŋunanna tu pakunkuankuti ja kaputku.
S.FORM: mai kalingunanna tu pakunkuankuti ya kaputku.
S.PHON: mai kariŋunanna tu pakunkuankuti ja kaputku.
S.TRANSL: 他不會忘記,我跟我朋友講故事.
He wouldn't forget it. I told this to my friends.

S.FORM: mtawtawati qunipa qaya tmnun nianati ma sapatawaan.
S.PHON: mtawtawati qunipa qaja tmnun nianati ma sapatawaan.
S.FORM: mtawtawati qunipa qaya tmnun nianati ma sapatawaan.
S.PHON: mtawtawati qunipa qaja tmnun nianati ma sapatawaan.
S.TRANSL: 他們笑.編織的時候沒有可以笑的.
They laughed. There is no laughingstock while we're weaving.

S.FORM: nayau a wawayta masang kikung tu tu nipatadu.
S.PHON: najau a wawajta masaŋ kikuŋ tu tu nipataɮu.
S.FORM: nayau a wawayta masang kikung tu tu nipatadu.
S.PHON: najau a wawajta masaŋ kikuŋ tu tu nipataɮu.
S.TRANSL: Marrying to the guy introduced by the elderly.

S.FORM: nayau nipatadu zaku qaya azu qenangidanta timeng nani msalasimi haw tatuqedtiimi ya ho usa ya metad timaisu qenataqaanku ni.
S.PHON: najau nipataɮu z~raku qaja az~ru qənaŋiɮanta timəŋ nani msarasimi haw tatuqəɮtiimi ja h* usa ja mətaɮ timaisu qənataqaanku ni.
S.FORM: nayau nipatadu zaku qaya azu qenangidanta timeng nani msalasimi haw tatuqedtiimi ya ho usa ya metad timaisu qenataqaanku ni.
S.PHON: najau nipataɮu z~raku qaja az~ru qənaŋiɮanta timəŋ nani msarasimi haw tatuqəɮtiimi ja h* usa ja mətaɮ timaisu qənataqaanku ni.
S.TRANSL: 我的也是介紹的. [翻譯漏失] 我不要你.

TRANSL.notes: Mine was also introduced (by the elderly). [translation missing] I don't want you.

S.TRANSL: Mine was also introduced . [translation missing] I don't want you.

W.TRANSL: 名物化-想要-名物化-1IPL.屬格
名物化-否定-名物化-1SG.屬格

S.TRANSL: Yes, I don't want you either.

S.FORM: yaupama tina tiepaw talibeng na zenaniq kwa.
S.PHON: jaupama tina tiəpaw tariβəŋ na z~rənaniq kwa.
S.FORM: yaupama tina tiepaw talibeng na zenaniq kwa.
S.PHON: jaupama tina tiəpaw tariβəŋ na z~rənaniq kwa.
S.TRANSL: Epaw老人家在我們水田的下方.
The elderly Epaw was at our paddy field.

S.FORM: XXXX tama ti taytaanku tama tinaliz si.
S.PHON: **** tama ti tajtaanku tama tinariz~r si.
S.FORM: XXXX tama ti taytaanku tama tinaliz si.
S.PHON: **** tama ti tajtaanku tama tinariz~r si.

S.TRANSL: Hurry up. Call the elderly Naliz.

S.FORM: XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX mai yu na XXXX mai mai izau tu anem ne XXXX maiita tu anem mana pamengita sasunis tu mazmun zinku qaya.
S.PHON: **** **** **** **** mai ju na **** mai mai iz~rau tu anəm nə **** maiita tu anəm mana paməŋita sasunis tu maz~rmun z~rinku qaja.
S.FORM: XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX mai yu na XXXX mai mai izau tu anem ne XXXX maiita tu anem mana pamengita sasunis tu mazmun zinku qaya.
S.PHON: **** **** **** **** mai ju na **** mai mai iz~rau tu anəm nə **** maiita tu anəm mana paməŋita sasunis tu maz~rmun z~rinku qaja.
S.TRANSL: 我不喜歡他,為什麼生那麼多小孩?
I didn't like him. Why did we have so many children?

S.FORM: nayau saizi XXXX mana Rakiya sisunisita.
nayau saizi XXXX mana Rakiya sisunisita.
kyami haw aita taqaanta nani mana en zinta qaya qawRatan.
S.PHON: kjami haw aita taqaanta nani mana ən z~rinta qaja qawʁatan.
S.FORM: kyami haw aita taqaanta nani mana en zinta qaya qawRatan.
S.PHON: kjami haw aita taqaanta nani mana ən z~rinta qaja qawʁatan.
S.TRANSL: 我們不喜歡.為什麼我們會一起睡.
We didn't like them. Why did we sleep together?

S.FORM: mtawaiku tu wawayku Raliz si nayauiku qaya.
S.PHON: mtawaiku tu wawajku ʁariz~r si najauiku qaja.
S.FORM: mtawaiku tu wawayku Raliz si nayauiku qaya.
S.PHON: mtawaiku tu wawajku ʁariz~r si najauiku qaja.
S.TRANSL: 我也笑我自己.對啊.我也是這樣.
I laughed at what I did. Yes. Me too.

S.FORM: taqaisu mana yau sunissu zinnaiku ni tiana ti qaya ti beliR.
S.PHON: taqaisu mana jau sunissu z~rinnaiku ni tiana ti qaja ti βəriʁ.
S.FORM: taqaisu mana yau sunissu zinnaiku ni tiana ti qaya ti beliR.
S.PHON: taqaisu mana jau sunissu z~rinnaiku ni tiana ti qaja ti βəriʁ.
S.TRANSL: 「你不喜歡,你為什麼有小孩?」BeliR這樣講.
'You don't like him. Why do you have children?' said BeliR.

S.FORM: tiangaw kaku nayau nayau mailiwimi masang nani taqaiku nazauimu kikung zinku nani.
S.PHON: tiaŋaw kaku najau najau mairiwimi masaŋ nani taqaiku naz~rauimu kikuŋ z~rinku nani.
S.FORM: tiangaw kaku nayau nayau mailiwimi masang nani taqaiku nazauimu kikung zinku nani.
S.PHON: tiaŋaw kaku najau najau mairiwimi masaŋ nani taqaiku naz~rauimu kikuŋ z~rinku nani.
S.TRANSL: 我不喜歡他,你們結婚就是這樣嗎?
I don't like him. Your marriage is like that?

S.FORM: taqaansu nani mana sasunisisu ka zinna quniakita nani quniakita.
S.PHON: taqaansu nani mana sasunisisu ka z~rinna quniakita nani quniakita.
S.FORM: taqaansu nani mana sasunisisu ka zinna quniakita nani quniakita.
S.PHON: taqaansu nani mana sasunisisu ka z~rinna quniakita nani quniakita.
S.TRANSL: 你不喜歡他,為什麼生小孩?沒辦法.沒辦法.
You don't like him. Why do you have children? There is nothing we could do. There is nothing we could do.
There is nothing we could do.

S.FORM: sunista si dui a zinta yu sunista si.
S.PHON: sunista si ɮui a z~rinta ju sunista si.
S.FORM: sunista si dui a zinta yu sunista si.
S.PHON: sunista si ɮui a z~rinta ju sunista si.

S.FORM: aiya zakuay mazmun Rabetin nipaRuinku nani.
S.PHON: aija z~rakuaj maz~rmun ʁaβətin nipaʁuinku nani.
S.FORM: aiya zakuay mazmun Rabetin nipaRuinku nani.
S.PHON: aija z~rakuaj maz~rmun ʁaβətin nipaʁuinku nani.

S.FORM: mana mwaza ya sunista zinku qaya m.
S.PHON: mana mwaz~ra ja sunista z~rinku qaja m.
S.FORM: mana mwaza ya sunista zinku qaya m.
S.PHON: mana mwaz~ra ja sunista z~rinku qaja m.
S.TRANSL: Why do we have so many children?

S.FORM: mulayta si unay yusti nayau ma pulpunantati ya sikawmaanta tayan en.
S.PHON: murajta si unaj justi najau ma purpunantati ja sikawmaanta tajan ən.
S.FORM: mulayta si unay yusti nayau ma pulpunantati ya sikawmaanta tayan en.
S.PHON: murajta si unaj justi najau ma purpunantati ja sikawmaanta tajan ən.
S.TRANSL: 我們的小孩.好了,這樣好了.我們就講到這邊.對.
Our children. Okay. That's it. Our talk ends here. Okay.
